subcodes.first_line: O spiritual friend! Thy honored brother, with spiritual rapture and heartfelt attraction, hath come to this merciful place [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای یار روحانی حضرت اخوی با ولهی روحانی و انجذابی وجدانی باین اقلیم رحمانی
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for forgiveness, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution, @prayer for specific individuals; groups, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness
